info.description: Neo N3 blockchain private net for developers

commands.name: batch
commands.description: Execute a series of offline Neo-Express operations

options.name: --reset
options.description:
Reset blockchain to genesis or specified checkpoint
before running batch file commands

options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

commands.name: vote
commands.description:
Vote candidate
Run 'candidate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

commands.name: run
commands.description:
Run a neo-express checkpoint (discarding changes on shutdown)
Run 'checkpoint [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --seconds-per-block
options.description:
Time between blocks
Default value is: 0.

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy contract to a neo-express instance

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope to use for transaction
signer (Default: CalledByEntry)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

options.name: --data
options.description:
Optional data parameter to pass to _deploy
operation

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

options.name: --force
options.description:
Deploy contract regardless of name
conflict

arguments.name: ACCOUNT
arguments.description: Account to pay contract deployment GAS fee

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download contract with storage from remote chain into local

options.name: --height
options.description:
Block height to get contract state for
Zero gets the latest
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Replace contract and storage if it already exists
Defaults to None if option unspecified, All if option
value unspecified
Allowed values are: None, All, ContractOnly,
StorageOnly.

arguments.name: SPECIFY MAINNET (DEFAULT), TESTNET OR JSON-RPC URL

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get information for a deployed contract

commands.name: hash
commands.description: Get contract hash for contract path and deployment account

arguments.name: ACCOUNT
arguments.description: Account that would deploy the contract

commands.name: invoke
commands.description: Invoke a contract using parameters from .neo-invoke.json file

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope to use for transaction
signer (Default: CalledByEntry)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

options.name: --results
options.description:
Invoke contract for results (does not cost
GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description:
Additional GAS to apply to the contract
invocation
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: INVOCATIONFILE
arguments.description: Path to contract invocation JSON file

arguments.name: ACCOUNT
arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

commands.name: update
commands.description:
Update the storage of a contract given the new key-value pair
Run 'storage [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.name: update
commands.description: update a contract that has been deployed to a neo-express

options.name: --data
options.description:
Data parameter for update method on
contract (Format: JSON)

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope to use for transaction
signer (Default: CalledByEntry)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

options.name: --password
options.description: Password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

arguments.name: ACCOUNT

commands.name: validate
commands.description:
Checks a contract for compliance with proposal specification
Run 'contract [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.name: nep11
commands.description: Checks if contract is NEP-11 compliant

commands.name: nep17
commands.description:
Checks if contract is NEP-17 compliant
Run 'validate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Name of .neo-express file to create
Default location is home directory as:
Linux:
$HOME/.neo-express/default.neo-express
Windows:
%UserProfile%\.neo-express\default.neo-express

options.name: --count
options.description:
Number of consensus nodes to create
(Default: 1)
Allowed values are: 1, 4, 7.
Default value is: 1.

options.name: --address-version
options.description:
Version to use for addresses in this
blockchain instance (Default: 53)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
Private key for default dev account
(Format: HEX or WIF)
Default: Random

options.name: --batch-filename
options.description:
Use a batch file to initialize the
blockchain after creation.

commands.name: execute
commands.description:
Invoke a custom script, the input text will be converted to
script with a priority: hex, base64, file path.

options.name: --account
options.description: Account to pay invocation GAS fee

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope for transaction signer(s)
(Allowed: None, CalledByEntry, Global)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

options.name: --results
options.description:
Invoke contract for results (does not cost
GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description:
Additional GAS to apply to the contract
invocation
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --password
options.description: password to use for NEP-2/NEP-6 account

commands.name: wallet
commands.description:
Manage neo-express wallets
Run 'neoxp [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
Private key for account (Format: HEX or WIF)
Default: Random

NEP-6 wallet name (Defaults to Neo-Express name if
unspecified)
